root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hold it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I get it. You don't have to say any more...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I get it. You don't have to say any more...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get it. You don't have to say any more...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So reckless. Still, that is very like you, Liona.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So reckless. Still, that is very like you, Liona.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So reckless. Still, that is very like you, Liona.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Then let's do this, Liona.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Then let's do this, Liona.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Then let's do this, Liona.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If things get complicated, we can ask Lycoris for help. That would be much better than now. What do you think?

root.m_Talk_FRA: If things get complicated, we can ask Lycoris for help. That would be much better than now. What do you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, I would like that, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, I would like that, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, I would like that, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you sure that's okay? Wouldn't I be imposing too much?

root.m_Talk_DEU: We're friends! Of course it is fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're friends! Of course it is fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...!
